description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push, pull requests, and a scheduled cron job. Use a single ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.9 to 3.13). For each Python version, check out the code, set up Python, install uv, sync the project with uv, check the lockfile, verify code style with ruff, execute tests with pytest, and upload coverage to Coveralls.
